entities.name: Cost Model
entities.context: Framework explaining how applicant processing costs accumulate across three stages

entities.name: Profile Setup
entities.context: First stage of applicant processing: one-time resume analysis

entities.name: Story Capture
entities.context: Second stage: applicants record short work stories

entities.name: Role Alignment
entities.context: Third stage: comparing ~30 role requirements against stories and resume; most cost-intensive

entities.name: Vibe Checks
entities.context: Inexpensive preliminary filtering to avoid full analysis on unlikely matches

relationships.context: First of three stages in the cost model
Second of three stages in the cost model
Used upfront to reduce candidates reaching cost-intensive role alignment stage
